title: rosa onoei var. hakonensis
intro: Rosa onoei var. hakonensis, also known as Hakone cherry rose or Japanese rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa onoei var. hakonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Japanese medicine. Herbal preparations of Rosa onoei var. hakonensis include infusions, teas, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
